title: HG Deep Clean and Service for Washing Machines & Dishwashers, Professional Standard Cleaner & Descaler for Home Laundry & Kitchen Cutlery/Plate Cleaning Appliances – 2 x 100g (248020106)
features: HG Dishwasher and Washing Machine Cleaner: Deep clean formula for servicing washing machines and dishwashers. Helps prevent faults by keeping appliances operating optimally for longer
Effective multi purpose cleaner for removing soap scum, scale and dirt: Prevents filters, floats, rims, seals, drums, drain pipes and inaccessible parts from malfunctioning due to deposits
Solves and prevents malfunctions: For all makes and models. Used and recommended by professional dishwasher engineers and repair services. Use every 3 months to help prevent avoidable faults
Enough for two to four treatments: A machine working efficiently can help you save energy, give great results and may help you save money by avoiding an appliance call-out repair charge
Includes: HG Deep Clean and Service, 2x 100g. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, including HG mould remover spray, multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Washing Machine and Dishwasher Deep Clean and Service is an innovative home appliance treatment which helps to keep your machines running efficiently. At first glance washing machines and dishwashers appear clean, but in every cycle crucial components are covered with limescale, soap and dirt deposits. This can mean smelly or dirty clothes and dishes, a machine that does work properly or a defective heating element. The deep cleaner ensures that the rubber seals remain elastic and water-proof, preventing leaks, malfunctioning or short-circuiting. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist cleaning products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 2 x 100g HG Washing Machine and Dishwasher Deep Clean and Service (248020106) How to use: Ensure the appliance is empty. For dishwashers – Fill the detergent tray. Set the programme on the highest possible temperature (65°C). Start the complete programme immediately and let it run without interruptions. For washing machines – Fill the detergent tray. Set the programme on the setting for dark laundry (60°C). Switch the washing machine on and let the programme finish completely, without interrupting, including spin drying. Wear protective gloves and eye protection. Keep out of reach/sight of children. Always read the label. Ingredients Contains A.o.: Non-ionic Surfactants 5-15%, Perfumes: Linalool, Limonene Safety Warning Medical personnel can request the data sheet via +31 (0)36 54 94 777 the consumer's information sheet can be obtained via www.HG.eu danger h314- causes severe skin burns and eye damage. P101- if medical advice is needed have product container or label at hand. P102- keep out of reach of children. P280- wear protective gloves and eye protection. P301+p330+p331- if swallowed: rinse mouth. Do not induce vomiting. P303+p361+p353- if on skin (or hair): take off immediately all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water [or shower]/ p305+p351+p338- if in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Contains: sodium hydroxide Box Contains 1 x 200g See more
